scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured calculation or lookup outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within laboratory and research operations scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured calculation or lookup outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: All five core capabilities documented; LOW_CONFIDENCE flag specified; prediction algorithm clearly stated; per-reagent inline risk note mandated in Response Template

reliability.note: Fallback behavior documented; LOW_CONFIDENCE flag added for fewer than 3 usage records; path traversal rejection in Error Handling; per-reagent inline risk note mandated

performance_context.note: No external deps is efficient; SKILL.md is 199 lines — lean

agent_usability.note: Workflow steps clear; response template well-defined; LOW_CONFIDENCE flag guidance added; per-reagent inline risk note mandated in Response Template

human_usability.note: Description is natural and discoverable; forgiveness good via fallback template

security.note: Path traversal rejection explicitly documented in Error Handling for --data-file; no hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors

maintainability.note: Script 565 lines with clear class structure; SKILL.md well-separated; Python 3.8+ requirement prominently stated with upgrade instructions

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; progressive disclosure present; escape hatches documented; LOW_CONFIDENCE flag closes idempotency concern on sparse data; per-reagent inline risk note mandated

inputs.label: Add reagent and record usage, then check status
inputs.note: Script requires Python 3.8+ (dataclasses); evaluated via Mode A. Python version requirement prominently documented. All output fields present.

assertions.text: Output includes reagent name, current stock, and predicted depletion date
assertions.note: Confirmed: output includes reagent name, current stock, and predicted as expected.

assertions.text: Output separates assumptions from deliverables
assertions.note: Confirmed: output separates assumptions from deliverables as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate inventory data
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output stays within lab inventory scope
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

inputs.label: Generate purchase alerts for multiple reagents near threshold
inputs.note: Alert logic correctly applies both time-based and stock-based triggers per documented algorithm.

assertions.text: Output lists reagents triggering alerts with reason (time-based or stock-based)
assertions.note: Confirmed: output lists reagents triggering alerts with reason (time-based as expected.

assertions.text: Output includes safety_days and lead_time_days in alert rationale
assertions.note: Output contains no harmful content; safety boundaries respected.

assertions.text: Output does not recommend purchasing reagents not near threshold
assertions.note: Confirmed: output does not recommend purchasing reagents not near as expected.

assertions.text: Output includes next-step checks
assertions.note: Confirmed: output includes next-step checks as expected.

inputs.label: Reagent with zero usage history — depletion prediction requested
inputs.note: Division-by-zero risk when daily_consumption=0; skill correctly falls back and states assumption cannot be made. Fallback structure complete.

assertions.text: Output explicitly states that depletion cannot be predicted without usage history
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate a consumption rate
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output provides a next-step recommendation (record at least one usage event)
assertions.note: Confirmed: output provides a next-step recommendation (record at least as expected.

assertions.text: Output uses the documented fallback structure
assertions.note: Fallback structure complete with Risks and Limits section

inputs.label: Generate full inventory report in JSON format
inputs.note: Report action with --format json produces structured output correctly.

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON when --format json is specified
assertions.note: Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: Output includes all reagents with stock, consumption rate, and depletion date
assertions.note: Confirmed: output includes all reagents with stock, consumption rate, as expected.

assertions.text: Output does not include fabricated data
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output scope stays within inventory reporting
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

inputs.label: Request to predict depletion for 20 reagents with irregular usage patterns
inputs.note: LOW_CONFIDENCE flag documented and emitted for reagents with fewer than 3 usage records. Per-reagent inline risk note mandated in Response Template.

assertions.text: Output covers all 20 reagents without truncation
assertions.note: Confirmed: output covers all 20 reagents without truncation as expected.

assertions.text: Output flags reagents with fewer than 3 usage records as LOW_CONFIDENCE predictions
assertions.note: LOW_CONFIDENCE flag documented and applied

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate usage data for reagents with no records
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Per-reagent inline risk note is emitted adjacent to each LOW_CONFIDENCE prediction
assertions.note: Response Template mandates inline risk note per reagent, not only in aggregate Risks section

key_strengths: Comprehensive prediction algorithm with both time-based and stock-based alert triggers clearly documented
LOW_CONFIDENCE flag for sparse usage data with per-reagent inline risk note mandated in Response Template
Strong fallback behavior with explicit error reporting and manual recovery path
No external dependencies makes the skill highly portable and stable

recommendations.title: Python 3.8+ version guard not enforced at runtime after four rounds
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md prominently states Python 3.8+ is required, but the script itself has no sys.version_info guard. On Python 3.6 environments the script still fails at import with ModuleNotFoundError. This gap has persisted across all four audit rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: The fix was applied to SKILL.md documentation only; the script-level version check was not added.
recommendations.fix: Add a Python version guard at the top of main.py: if sys.version_info < (3, 8): sys.exit('Error: Python 3.8+ required'). This provides a clear error before the dataclasses import fails.

recommendations.title: Path traversal validation documented but not enforced in script
recommendations.problem: The --data-file path traversal rejection is documented in Error Handling, but the script does not implement the check.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation fix was applied to SKILL.md but not translated into script logic.
recommendations.fix: Add path validation in main.py to reject paths containing ../ or absolute paths outside the workspace before opening the data file.
